description: Anthropic Messages streaming tool_use with JSON input deltas. Used to validate canonical v3 tool-input lifecycle and final tool-call mapping.

source.notes: We replay the `.chunks.txt` fixture via FakeAnthropicClient and assert canonical parts JSONL from llm_dart_ai.streamChatParts.

notes: Tool inputs may stream as partial_json deltas; canonical parts should keep deltas as strings.
